title: Mention someone via automation
excerpt: A major feature we need is the ability to mention someone via an automation. When something happens, we’d like the automation to post an update on the item and mention a Person in a column.

posts.author: Jennadoerring (Jenna Doerring)
posts.cookedHtml: A major feature we need is the ability to mention someone via an automation. When something happens, we’d like the automation to post an update on the item and mention a Person in a column.

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, while you can put someone in an update this does not work as a true mention and so the person is not notified correctly.

posts.author: DanaWD (Dana Wizman Danan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Is this feature available? I am trying to automate it and not succeeding

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: No. I even tried the workaround to insert the link that is behind a mention (you can see it via hover) but unfortunately that does not lead to a notification either.

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I do not know why this is still not available since it let you add the name of the person responsible, but without a tag!
